description_long: This is a modern, compact two-seater sofa with a minimalist design, featuring a sturdy rectangular frame in a light, neutral color. The sofa has two thick, boxy seat cushions and two matching back cushions, all upholstered in a light gray fabric with a subtle, fine texture. The right side of the sofa is equipped with a single, straight armrest that matches the height of the backrest, while the left side is open, giving it an asymmetric, sectional appearance. The frame is constructed from what appears to be metal or painted wood, with four straight, square legs positioned at each corner for stability. The overall look is clean and contemporary, suitable for outdoor or urban public spaces such as parks, plazas, or communal seating areas. The sofa's design emphasizes comfort and durability, with ample seating space and a robust, weather-resistant structure.
description: A modern, two-seater sofa with a light gray, textured upholstery and a minimalist frame, featuring a single right-side armrest and square legs. Its clean, sturdy design is ideal for urban outdoor settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing two seat and back cushions, the right-side armrest, and the full width of the sofa.
description_view_1: Right-side view highlighting the single armrest and the sofa's depth, with the frame and cushion thickness visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the frame and both back cushions, with no armrests visible from this angle.
description_view_3: Left-side view showing the open side without an armrest and the full length of the seat and back cushions.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two individual seat cushions and two matching back cushions, all rectangular and uniform in size, with a simple, non-tufted arrangement. Cushions appear loose but fit snugly within the frame.
attribute_armrest_style: Single, straight armrest on the right side, matching the height of the backrest, with a boxy, track profile and no visible padding or decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Four straight, square legs positioned at each corner, likely made of metal or painted wood, with an exposed, minimalist design and no additional ornamentation.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, straight backrest formed by two rectangular cushions, continuous across the width except for the open left side, with no tufting or decorative features.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid light gray fabric with a subtle, fine texture; no visible patterns, tufting, or decorative stitching.
